title: anthyllis vulneraria proles vulnerarioides
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria proles vulnerarioides, also known as vulnerary broom or sensitive plant, is a subspecies of the anthyllis vulneraria plant, native to Europe and Western Asia. The medicinal properties of this plant lie in its high content of flavonoids and alkaloids, which have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Anthyllis vulneraria proles vulnerarioides include its potential in treating wounds, skin irritations, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of respiratory tract infections. The herbal preparations of this plant include dried roots, leaves, and flowers, which can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote healing and soothe digestive issues.
